overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through a desert canyon toward an ancient Egyptian monument. The character traverses a dirt path flanked by rocky cliffs and palm trees, approaching a large obelisk structure with a colonnaded temple entrance.

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking steadily through the desert canyon toward the distant obelisk monument

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the left wall of the canyon
tall reddish-brown rock formation forming the right wall of the canyon
sandy dirt trail winding through the canyon floor
tall dark stone obelisk with pointed top visible in the distance
sparse palm trees scattered along the right side of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following Bayek walking through a wide desert canyon. Rocky cliffs flank both sides of the sandy path while a tall ancient obelisk stands visible in the far distance ahead. Sparse palm trees dot the right side of the canyon as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: passing close to large date palm trees on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Bayek continuing toward the obelisk, passing palm trees on the right as the monument grows larger

entered.detail: tall date palm trees with green fronds lining the right side of the approach
white stone base structure supporting the obelisk with hieroglyphic details

segments.scene_description: The character approaches closer to the ancient monument, passing tall date palms on the right. The right canyon wall falls away revealing the stone platform base of the obelisk. The monument now dominates the center of the frame as the character nears the structure.

events.description: ancient stone colonnade with pillars comes into view at the monument base

agents.ego_description: Bayek arriving at the monument base and approaching the colonnaded temple entrance

entered.detail: ancient Egyptian temple entrance with tall stone pillars and hieroglyphic carvings
stone steps leading up to the temple entrance beneath the colonnade

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the monument where a stone colonnade with ancient pillars becomes visible. The obelisk now stands to the right as Bayek approaches the temple entrance. The scene reveals the architectural details of the white stone base and carved columns at the monument's foundation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert canyon that gradually closes in on the architectural details of an ancient Egyptian monument. It begins with a third-person view of Bayek walking along a sandy path flanked by rocky cliffs, with a distant obelisk serving as the focal point ahead. As the character moves forward, the camera passes sparse date palms on the right while the canyon wall recedes to reveal the massive stone platform base of the monument. The scene then shifts as the obelisk begins to dominate the frame, eventually moving to the side to uncover a stone colonnade of carved pillars. Finally, the camera reaches the foundation of the structure, focusing on the white stone base and the temple entrance.
